debug_info.goal:
Hist : History
X : Sequent
tab : Tableau Hist X
Hist✝ : History
X✝ : Sequent
nrep✝ : ¬rep Hist✝ X✝
nbas✝ : ¬X✝.basic
lt✝ : LocalTableau X✝
next✝ : (Y : Sequent) → Y ∈ endNodesOf lt✝ → Tableau (X✝ :: Hist✝) Y
Y✝ : Sequent
Y_in✝ : Y✝ ∈ endNodesOf lt✝
tail✝ : PathIn (next✝ Y✝ Y_in✝)
IH : tail✝.flip.flip = ⋯ ▸ cast ⋯ tail✝
⊢ loc ⋯ (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝.flip).flip) = ⋯ ▸ cast ⋯ (loc Y_in✝ tail✝)

have h₁ : tail✝.flip.flip = (Tableau.flip_flip ▸ (by convert tail✝ <;> simp)) := by
      simpa using IH
    have h₂ : (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝.flip).flip) = (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝)) := by
      simp_all [PathIn.flip]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [_cast])
      <;>
      (try convert Eq.refl _ using 1 <;> simp_all [_cast])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Eq.refl])
      <;>
      (try rfl)
      <;>
      (try simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Eq.refl])
      <;>
      (try rfl)
    have h₃ : (loc ⋯ (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝.flip).flip)) = (loc ⋯ (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝))) := by
      simp_all [PathIn.flip]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try convert Eq.refl _ using 1 <;> simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try rfl)
    have h₄ : (loc ⋯ (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝))) = (Tableau.flip_flip ▸ (by convert (loc Y_in✝ tail✝) <;> simp)) := by
      simp_all [PathIn.flip]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try convert Eq.refl _ using 1 <;> simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try simp_all [cast_inj])
      <;>
      (try rfl)
    simp_all [PathIn.flip]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [cast_inj])
    <;>
    (try convert Eq.refl _ using 1 <;> simp_all [cast_inj])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [cast_inj])
    <;>
    (try rfl)
